description: initiator nonce increments by 2 each send
older packet after newer accepted → rejected
higher valid counter accepted after skip (nonce=6 after seqRecv=1)
lower counter after skip rejected (nonce=4 after seqRecv=6)
next valid counter accepted after skip (nonce=8)
tampered ciphertext byte → None (GCM auth failure)
zero-key initiator pt=b"test" → exact test vector packet
